criteria.text: The UI clearly communicates which line will be timestamped when the stamp button is pressed
After stamping, the newly-promoted line is clearly the "next to stamp"
criteria.test_id: #28 — stamp target carries the next-up class and advances after a stamp

criteria.text: The distinction between "just stamped" and "about to stamp" is visually unambiguous
criteria.test_id: #28 — distinct "Now playing" (prev) and "Next to stamp" (target) regions render

criteria.text: No actual stamp logic changes (only display/labelling)
criteria.test_id: issue-28-c4: stamp-to-clip mapping (server stampsToClips) is unchanged by the labelling work
